title: Max Verstappen 'picked' to drive new Formula E beast
summary:
In this exclusive interview, Formula E CEO Jeff Dodds reveals why Max Verstappen is "picked" as the dream driver to take on the all-new Gen4 Formula E car — a machine already being described as a true "beast."

Speaking at the official launch at the Paul Ricard circuit, Dodds breaks down the incredible performance leap of the Gen4 era, including mind-blowing acceleration, over 200 mph top speeds, and cutting-edge electric racing technology that could rival Formula 1. If you’re a fan of Max Verstappen, Formula E, Formula 1, or the future of motorsport, this is a must-watch.
